name: Twitcharr
description: Twitch live-TV lineup for Dispatcharr. Add channel names by comma or line break, optionally use discovery tokens, and sync Channels, Streams and the XMLTV guide. Anonymous Twitch metadata only — no OAuth, Client ID/Secret or Twitch login.
author: eliasbruno124

fields.label: Twitch channels / discovery
fields.placeholder:
gronkh, papaplatte, knossi
top:de:25
game:Just Chatting:10
search:knossi
fields.description: Channel names separated by commas or line breaks. twitch.tv URLs work too. Discovery tokens: top, top:<lang>:<n>, game:<category>:<n>, search:<text>:<n>.

fields.label: Trending countries
fields.description: Comma-separated language codes. The plugin adds top live streams per code on every refresh.

fields.label: Trending per country
fields.description: Streams per language code. 0 disables.

fields.label: Global trending
fields.description: Globally trending streams added per refresh. 0 disables.

fields.label: Channel group
fields.description: Dispatcharr channel group used for managed Twitch channels.

fields.label: Starting channel number
fields.description: First number for new channels. Existing numbers are kept.

fields.label: Stream quality
fields.description: adaptive picks the best variant your bandwidth supports. Fixed values are passed to Streamlink as-is.

fields.label: Connection bandwidth (Mbps)
fields.description: Used by adaptive quality. 0 = use last measured value or a safe fallback.

fields.label: Bandwidth safety margin (%)
fields.description: Headroom above Twitch's nominal bitrate. Higher = safer, lower = sharper.

fields.label: Fastest possible startup
fields.description: Aggressive Streamlink startup tuning for quicker channel switching.

fields.label: Low-latency mode
fields.description: Enables Twitch low-latency Streamlink options.

fields.label: Show offline channels
fields.description: ON: keep offline streamers visible while at least one Twitch channel is live. OFF: remove offline streamers and re-add them when they go live.

fields.label: Always keep a 'no streams online' channel
fields.description: Keeps one placeholder channel when nobody is live so Live TV is never empty.

fields.label: Use live preview as channel icon
fields.description: ON: Twitch live preview as the channel icon. OFF: game art or profile picture.

fields.label: Profile picture for Just Chatting
fields.description: Used only when live previews are OFF. Shows the profile picture for Just Chatting streams.

fields.label: EPG refresh interval (minutes)
fields.description: How often live status, guide data and icons are refreshed. Minimum 1.

fields.label: ttv.lol proxy servers
fields.description: Comma-separated proxy URLs passed to Streamlink. Leave empty to disable.

fields.label: Emby / Jellyfin URL
fields.description: Optional. Triggers the server's Refresh Guide task after EPG refreshes.

fields.label: Emby / Jellyfin API key
fields.description: Required when an Emby/Jellyfin URL is set. Not a Twitch token.

fields.label: Discord webhook for go-live alerts
fields.description: Optional. Posts a Discord embed when a configured streamer goes live.

fields.label: Auto-check for plugin updates
fields.description: Checks GitHub for new releases every 6 hours.

fields.label: Auto-apply plugin updates
fields.description: Downloads and applies new releases automatically. Reload plugins afterwards.

fields.label: Data directory
fields.description: Folder for twitch.xmltv, scheduler state and the cached ttv.lol plugin.

actions.label: Sync now
actions.description: Refresh ttv.lol if needed, refresh Twitch data, write the guide, sync channels and trigger integrations.

actions.label: Refresh guide
actions.description: Refresh Twitch status, write XMLTV and Dispatcharr EPG rows.

actions.label: Sync channels
actions.description: Write the current guide, then create, update or remove managed Channels and Streams.

actions.label: Full refresh
actions.description: ttv.lol check, channel sync and guide refresh in one pass.

actions.label: Measure bandwidth
actions.description: Run quick Cloudflare probes, save the Mbps value and update the adaptive profile.

actions.label: Test proxies
actions.description: Probe every configured ttv.lol proxy URL and report HTTP code and latency.

actions.label: Test Discord webhook
actions.description: Send one test embed to the configured Discord webhook.

actions.label: Refresh Emby / Jellyfin
actions.description: Trigger the Refresh Guide task on the configured Emby or Jellyfin server.

actions.label: ttv.lol — check / force update
actions.description: Check for a new ttv.lol release. Use 'Force update ttv.lol' on the right to redownload right away.

actions.label: ttv.lol — check / force update
actions.description: Force-redownload the latest ttv.lol twitch.py regardless of cache. Use 'Check ttv.lol' on the left first.

confirm.title: Force-update ttv.lol?
confirm.message: Redownloads the latest ttv.lol twitch.py even if the cached ETag matches.

actions.label: Plugin — check / apply update
actions.description: Check GitHub Releases for a newer Twitcharr version.

actions.label: Plugin — check / apply update
actions.description: Download the latest release and replace the plugin code. Reload plugins afterwards.

confirm.title: Update Twitcharr from GitHub?
confirm.message: Downloads the latest release and overwrites the plugin code. Settings, XMLTV and the cached ttv.lol plugin are kept.

actions.label: Donate via PayPal
actions.description: Support Twitcharr development via PayPal. Thank you!

actions.label: Uninstall
actions.description: Remove managed StreamProfile, EPG source, Channels and Streams. Plugin files and settings stay.

confirm.title: Remove all managed objects?
confirm.message: Deletes the Twitch StreamProfile, EPG source and every Channel/Stream the plugin created. The plugin and its settings stay.
